Overrides.Override: Melee Hits Fortify Limited to 1 Attribute Notable Tattoo
10% reduced Attributes 40% increased Global Defences Limited to 1 Runegraft of the Fortress
Tinctures applied to you have 30% increased Effect while affected by no Flasks Limited to 1 Runegraft of the Imbued
Buffs on you expire 30% slower Debuffs on you expire 30% faster Limited to 1 Runegraft of the Warp
